description_long: This is a large, freestanding office printer or photocopier, typically found in business or public urban environments. The device features a multi-tiered rectangular body with three main lower drawers for paper storage and a prominent upper section housing a control panel and document feeder. The control panel is located on the top front, with a blue interface and several buttons, a display screen, and a numeric keypad. There is a paper output tray extending from the middle section, and a visible A4 sheet on the ground nearby, suggesting its paper handling capabilities. The exterior is primarily a light beige color with blue accent labels, and the overall design is boxy and utilitarian, suitable for high-volume printing or copying. The asset sits on a circular tiled platform, but the printer itself is the main focus.
description: A large, beige office printer/copier with a blue control panel, multiple drawers, and a paper output tray, designed for high-volume use. Its boxy, multi-tiered structure and utilitarian design make it suitable for urban office or public settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel, document feeder, three drawers, and the paper output tray, with an A4 sheet on the ground.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the side panel, venting, and the A4 sheet on the ground; the control panel and output tray are partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, featureless back and the output tray extending from the side; no control panel or drawers visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the control panel, the output tray, and the A4 sheet on the ground; some venting and panel details are visible.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is located on the top front of the printer, rectangular in shape, with a blue surface, a display screen, a numeric keypad, and several buttons arranged in a grid.
